pdg_node.informal_desc: Represents the entry-point stage with no observable computation, state access, or side effects.

declaration.name: torqueadjustmentidentitystage
declaration.docstring: Represents the entry-point stage with no observable computation, state access, or side effects.
declaration.conceptual_summary: NullaryIdentityStage. Implements an identity morphism at a pipeline boundary: execution occurs, but no data is consumed, produced, or mutated. It preserves global system state and observable behavior exactly, serving only as a structural anchor for composition, scheduling, or replacement.. Applications: Compiler engineering: placeholder transformation pass used to preserve pass-order scaffolding before optimization logic is introduced., Workflow orchestration in laboratory automation: explicit start node that enforces graph structure without altering any measurement stream., Distributed systems testing: inert stage inserted to validate tracing, scheduling, and dependency wiring independently of functional computation., Control-system simulation: baseline stage representing zero control action to isolate plant dynamics from controller effects.
